title: Site-Theme Demo
description: A data-representation artifact that inherits the host site theme — declares artifact.theme "site", consumes theme tokens, defines no palette of its own.

artifact.purpose: Demonstrate site mode: a content-coverage dashboard that inherits the host theme via route injection, re-coloring with the docs chrome in both light and dark instead of owning a palette.
artifact.data: Illustrative counts — doc sets, sections, themes, content types, and pages-per-section for the user-guide. No external data.
artifact.interactions: Re-themes live with the site: the route injects the resolved theme CSS and stamps data-theme; no local palette to go stale.
